name: Beinecke Plaza
task: Photo of the glowing translucent marble cube of the Beinecke Library at night.
verifyHint: image must show the Beinecke Rare Book Library — a windowless cube of translucent marble panels in a Brutalist frame, ideally lit from within at night
rewardLabel: The library glows from inside. Whisper a question to the books and keep moving.

name: The Taft Hotel
task: Photo of the historic Taft Apartments façade with the 'TAFT' lettering visible.
verifyHint: image must show the historic Taft (former Taft Hotel) building façade in downtown New Haven, with the TAFT name or signage clearly visible
rewardLabel: Presidents slept here. So did ghosts. Allegedly.
